faqs.question: How do I know if I have a clothes moth infestation in my Mariners Harbor home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include small holes in wool clothing or blankets, silky tubes or cases in closets, cream-colored moths flying near wardrobes, and webbing in fabric folds. You may also notice larvae (small caterpillars) on clothing or damage to carpets, upholstery, or stored fabrics. Our Mariners Harbor technicians provide thorough inspections to confirm infestations and identify the moth species.

faqs.question: What does clothes moth control cost in Mariners Harbor?
faqs.answer: Clothes moth control in Mariners Harbor typically ranges from $550 to $5,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, the size of your home, and the number of treatments required. Minor infestations in a single room start at the lower end, while whole-house treatments or severe cases with multiple affected areas cost more. We provide free estimates and customize treatment plans to your specific situation.
